name: F.A. Downforce
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｆ．Ａ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フォーミュラアスリート</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ダウンフォース
desc: Target 1 "F.A." monster you control; increase its Level by 2 until the end of this turn. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "F.A." monster you control; increase its Level by 2 until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "F.A. Downforce" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 "F.A." monster you control; increase its Level by 2 until the end of this turn. banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
